items.title: Playbooks
items.valueHypothesis: Reusable SOPs and step-by-step workflows create high daily utility without requiring external APIs.
acceptanceChecklist: Marketplace lane is defined as an addon and remains hidden from non-entitled org toolbars.
Matt enterprise org can load the route, create a playbook, edit it, and reopen it after deploy.
Relevant build and test checks pass and the production smoke run succeeds.

items.title: Proposal Builder
items.valueHypothesis: Proposal generation turns shared knowledge into revenue-facing output without needing third-party credentials.
acceptanceChecklist: Marketplace lane is addon-gated and not visible on non-entitled org toolbars.
Matt enterprise org can create, update, and read back a proposal draft.
Scoped build, tests, deploy, and production smoke verification pass.

items.title: Content Planner
items.valueHypothesis: Editorial planning adds team value immediately and supports future campaign plugins without adding API cost.
acceptanceChecklist: Marketplace lane is addon-gated and not visible on non-entitled org toolbars.
Matt enterprise org can create a content plan item, update its status, and reload the surface.
Scoped build, tests, deploy, and production smoke verification pass.

items.title: Asset Library
items.valueHypothesis: A shared asset library increases operational stickiness with no external provider dependency.
acceptanceChecklist: Marketplace lane is addon-gated and not visible on non-entitled org toolbars.
Matt enterprise org can create, update, and browse at least one asset record.
Scoped build, tests, deploy, and production smoke verification pass.

items.title: Intake Briefs
items.valueHypothesis: Structured briefs convert conversations into repeatable project intake without needing any paid integration.
acceptanceChecklist: Marketplace lane is addon-gated and not visible on non-entitled org toolbars.
Matt enterprise org can create, update, and reopen a brief.
Scoped build, tests, deploy, and production smoke verification pass.
